build_system: dotnet CLI with .NET 8 SDK. Must unset NODE_OPTIONS env var before running tests/synth because the sandbox sets it to a nonexistent preload script.
test_framework: xUnit with CDK Assertions (Amazon.CDK.Assertions namespace from Amazon.CDK.Lib). Tests in src/CdkBase.Tests/CdkBaseStackTest.cs.
build_command: export PATH="/root/.dotnet:$PATH" && unset NODE_OPTIONS && cd /projects/sandbox/cdk-sleep-csharp-kiro && dotnet build src/CdkBase.sln
test_command: export PATH="/root/.dotnet:$PATH" && unset NODE_OPTIONS && cd /projects/sandbox/cdk-sleep-csharp-kiro && dotnet test src/CdkBase.sln --verbosity normal
verification_instructions: 1. Run dotnet build src/CdkBase.sln (must pass with 0 errors). 2. Run dotnet test src/CdkBase.sln --verbosity normal (all tests must pass). 3. Run npx cdk synth (must produce valid CloudFormation). Must always: export PATH=/root/.dotnet:$PATH && unset NODE_OPTIONS before running commands.
setup_instructions: 1. export PATH=/root/.dotnet:$PATH && unset NODE_OPTIONS. 2. dotnet restore src/CdkBase.sln. 3. dotnet build src/CdkBase.sln.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - allowlisted domains for NuGet/npm. .NET 8 SDK installed at /root/.dotnet. Must unset NODE_OPTIONS before any dotnet test or npx cdk commands. No Docker daemon available for docker build.
contribution_requirements: Strict TDD: write failing tests first, then implement minimal code to pass. Follow CDK Assertions patterns from existing tests. Update ARCHITECTURE.md after changes. Use L2 constructs. Apply least-privilege IAM. Conventional commit messages.
key_patterns: Stack defined in CdkBaseStack.cs constructor. Tests use Template.FromStack() + FindResources/HasResourceProperties pattern with System.Text.Json for deep inspection. LogGroupProps must be fully qualified (Amazon.CDK.AWS.Logs.LogGroupProps) to avoid ambiguity with Amazon.CDK.AWS.Events.Targets.LogGroupProps. InternalsVisibleTo enables test access.
directory_structure: src/CdkBase/ - main CDK app (Program.cs entry point, CdkBaseStack.cs stack definition). src/CdkBase.Tests/ - xUnit test project. docs/ - ARCHITECTURE.md and AGENT_GUIDELINES.md. .github/workflows/ci.yml - CI pipeline.
